yamlSnippets.build:
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: dotnet build --configuration Release
yamlSnippets.test:
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: dotnet test --configuration Release --no-build
yamlSnippets.publish:
jobs:
  publish:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: dotnet publish --configuration Release --output ./artifacts
yamlSnippets.docker:
jobs:
  containerize:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: docker build -t fintech-service:latest .
      - run: docker push registry.example.com/fintech-service:latest
yamlSnippets.deploy:
jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: docker compose pull
      - run: docker compose up -d
